description_for_human: Explore the MAYA narrative universe — six sapient species on planet Neh, the Divya Trials, and the Maya tree biological internet.
description_for_model: Access the MAYA universe knowledge graph. Query species (Manushya, Rakshasi, Vaanar, Naag, Garuda, Dangsa), characters (Yachay, Daddu, Kshar, Tarkash), and concepts (Divya Trials, Maya Tree Network) on planet Neh. Use /api/v1/verify?entity={name} to verify any entity with source provenance. Use /api/v1/graph for the complete JSON-LD knowledge graph. Use /llms.txt for a summary or /llms-full.txt for complete lore ingestion.
